title: How to solve media divide - Request

enrichment.summary: Kyle responds to a viewer request about solving the media divide, arguing that a lack of historical literacy is the root cause. He traces the problem through social media bubbles, the normalization of weed, and algorithmic manipulation, and proposes that more people making videos, studying history, and expressing themselves openly would break down ideological enclaves.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: mostly truthful but still too aligned with wealthy donor class

stances.topic: Fox News / Tucker Carlson / Sean Hannity

stances.position: dangerous right-wing mass delusion fueled by social media enclaves
predictable and inevitable given Trump's rhetoric; participants deluded
widespread historical literacy is the core fix
rigged to promote wealth display over substantive content
widespread constant use contributes to mass psychosis and political radicalization
not terrorists; would side with them over proud boys but prefers dialogue
massively wasteful; should close all overseas bases and redirect funds
legitimate for figures like Trump but wrong when applied to ordinary people
broken model; people should create videos for self-expression not profit
harmful and economically destructive, condemned across religious traditions
a classic third-world authoritarian tactic; only works on historically illiterate audiences
